welcome.welcome-description: Your AI-powered learning assistant for creating intelligent chatbots from your educational content.

overview.noChatbotsYet: You don't have any chatbots yet?
overview.helpYouCreate: I'll help you create one easily!

chatbots.title: My Chatbots
chatbots.createFirst: Get started by creating your first AI assistant

newChatbot.title: Create New Chatbot
newChatbot.wizardDescription: Follow these steps to create your intelligent assistant
newChatbot.warningNotSaved: Are you sure you want to leave? Your progress will be lost.

sourceType.title: Choose Data Source
sourceType.description: Select where your chatbot will get its knowledge from

moodle.title: Moodle Integration
moodle.description: Connect to your Moodle platform and use course content

files.title: File Upload
files.description: Upload your own documents and files

sourceType.additionalFilesNote: It is also possible to add additional files (e.g. PDF, docx, ...)

basicInfo.name: Chatbot Name
basicInfo.namePlaceholder: Enter a name for your chatbot
basicInfo.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what your chatbot will do
basicInfo.connectionError: Connection failed. Please check your credentials.
basicInfo.helpText: Need help? Learn how to get your Moodle token

config.chatbotTypeDescription: Choose how your chatbot will interact with users
config.teacherDescription: Formal and instructive, ideal for direct teaching
config.studyBuddyDescription: Friendly and encouraging, perfect for collaborative learning
config.customPersonaPlaceholder: Enter custom persona instructions for your chatbot...
config.citeSourcesDescription: When enabled, the chatbot will cite sources using [1], [2], etc. in its responses.

content.typesDescription: Select which types of content to include
content.previewDescription: Review and select specific content items

fileUpload.title: Upload Files
fileUpload.description: Upload documents to train your chatbot
fileUpload.supportedFormats: PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, TXT, MD, HTML, CSV, TEX, H5P (max. 100MB per file)
fileUpload.supplementMoodle: You can upload additional files here to supplement your Moodle content. This is useful for materials not in Moodle, reference documents, or extra resources. You can skip this step if you only want to use Moodle content.

review.title: Review & Confirm
review.processingDescription: After you create the chatbot, we'll process your content:
review.processingStep3Files: Process and index your uploaded files
review.confirmationText: I confirm that I have reviewed all settings and want to create this chatbot
review.pleaseWait: This may take a few moments. Please don't close this window.

editChatbot.name: Name
editChatbot.currentlyActive: Chatbot is currently active and accessible
editChatbot.forceOcrHint: Forces text recognition on all pages. Recommended for scanned or image-heavy documents. May reduce quality for documents with embedded text.
editChatbot.scheduleHint: Automatically refresh content from the linked Moodle course on a recurring schedule.
editChatbot.scheduleSaveFailed: Failed to save schedule. Please try again.
editChatbot.parseErrorDescription: We were unable to extract text from this document. This can happen for several reasons:
editChatbot.parseErrorReason1: The document contains only images or scanned pages without embedded text
editChatbot.parseErrorReason2: The file format is not supported or is corrupted
editChatbot.parseErrorReason3: The document is password-protected or encrypted
editChatbot.parseErrorReason4: The file is empty or contains no extractable content
editChatbot.noFilesRemain: No files will remain after deletion
editChatbot.deletionPermanent: Deleting files is permanent. Make sure you want to remove these files before confirming.
editChatbot.customDescription: Customize your chatbot's tone and personality
editChatbot.personaTeacherDescription: Formal and instructive, ideal for direct teaching
editChatbot.personaStudyCompanionDescription: Friendly and encouraging, perfect for collaborative learning
editChatbot.personaCustomDescription: Customize your chatbot's tone and personality
editChatbot.personaCustomPlaceholder: Describe your chatbot's tone, style and behavior…
editChatbot.personaCustomLearnMore: Learn how to write a custom persona
editChatbot.promptSuggestionsDescription: Example questions shown to users when they open the chat
editChatbot.suggestionPlaceholder: e.g. What are the key concepts of this course?
editChatbot.avatarHint: PNG, JPEG or WebP. Max 5 MB.
editChatbot.avatarFallbackHint: Using the selected persona's default avatar.
editChatbot.avatarInvalidType: Avatar must be a PNG, JPEG or WebP image.
editChatbot.avatarTooLarge: Avatar must be smaller than 5 MB.
editChatbot.avatarUploadFailed: Could not upload the avatar. Please try again.
editChatbot.avatarRemoveFailed: Could not remove the avatar. Please try again.
editChatbot.syncFailed: Could not start synchronization. Please try again.
editChatbot.deleteFailed: Could not delete the chatbot. Please try again.
editChatbot.failedFilesWarning: {{count}} file(s) could not be processed in the last sync
editChatbot.ingestionFailedEmptyContent: No text could be extracted from this file
editChatbot.qrCodeDescription: Scan this QR code with a mobile device to quickly access your chatbot
editChatbot.passwordHint: Users will need this password to access the chatbot
editChatbot.persistSessionEnabledDescription: Visitors keep their conversation across page reloads (stored in their browser's localStorage)
editChatbot.persistSessionDisabledDescription: Each page reload starts a fresh conversation
editChatbot.piiFilterEnabledDescription: Personal data (emails, phone numbers, etc.) is redacted from messages before they are sent to the AI model
editChatbot.piiFilterDisabledDescription: Messages are sent to the AI model without redaction
editChatbot.piiFilterLatencyNote: Scanning each message adds a short delay before the AI replies.
editChatbot.apiEnabledDescription: External tools can use this chatbot via the OpenAI-compatible API
editChatbot.apiDisabledDescription: Enable to allow access via the OpenAI-compatible API
editChatbot.rotateApiKey: Generate a new API key and invalidate the current one
editChatbot.rotateApiKeyConfirm: Rotating the API key will immediately invalidate the current one. Any integration using it will need to be updated. Continue?
editChatbot.rotateApiKeyFailed: Failed to rotate the API key. Please try again.
editChatbot.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

chat.askAnything: Ask me anything and I'll do my best to help you!
chat.chatbotDisabled: This chatbot is currently disabled. Please come back later!
chat.aiDisclaimer: This information is generated by an AI and may contain errors or outdated details. Please verify important facts from reliable sources.
chat.clearConfirm: Clear this conversation? This cannot be undone.
chat.errorProcessing: Sorry, an error occurred. Please try again.
chat.piiFilterWarning: Personal data was detected and removed from your message before it reached the AI. As a precaution, please avoid sharing personal information in this chat.

moodleModal.title: Manage Moodle Courses
moodleModal.adjustSearch: Try adjusting your search or refresh the list

contentBrowser.parseErrorDescription: Failed to load the parsed content for this item.
contentBrowser.noContentForItem: No extracted content available for this item
contentBrowser.selectItem: Select an item to view its content

moodleContentBrowser.title: Browse Moodle Content
moodleContentBrowser.noContent: No content found for this course
moodleContentBrowser.noContentForItem: No extracted content available for this item
moodleContentBrowser.selectItem: Select an activity or file to view its content

loading.title: Loading Chatbot
loading.description: Please wait while we prepare your conversation...

processing.title: Processing in Progress
processing.description: This chatbot is currently being set up. Please try again in a few moments.

disabled.title: Chatbot Unavailable
disabled.description: This chatbot is currently disabled and cannot be accessed. Please contact the administrator or try again later.

password.title: Password Required
password.description: This chatbot is password protected. Please enter the password to continue.
password.changed: The password has been changed. Please enter the new password.

private.title: Login Required
private.description: This is a private chatbot. Please log in to access it.

error.title: Chatbot unavailable
error.description: This chatbot is not available at the moment. Please contact its administrator or try again later.
error.loadFailed: Unable to load the chatbot. Please contact its administrator or try again later.
error.accessFailed: Unable to access the chatbot. Please contact its administrator or try again later.
error.chatbotError: This chatbot is not available at the moment. Please contact its administrator or try again later.

textEntry.titlePlaceholder: Give your text a short title
textEntry.contentPlaceholder: Paste or type the text you want the chatbot to learn from…
textEntry.hint: This text will be processed and indexed like an uploaded file.
